curation_policy: Copied compact JSON/CSV/Markdown summaries, HTML views, and PNG figures. Excluded huge reusable caches, latent arrays, NPZ direction caches, duplicate full panels, and model weights generated by probe notebooks.

models.name: linear_attention
models.description: Non-autoregressive Transformer VAE with linear slot pooling and linear decoder cross-attention.

models.name: simple_attention
models.description: Non-autoregressive Transformer VAE with standard multi-head slot pooling and standard cross-attention.

models.name: autoregressive
models.description: Autoregressive Transformer VAE with slot encoder and causal Transformer decoder.
